name: Freezing Peaches
recipeIngredient: 1 cup orange juice concentrate (or equal amount of fresh orange juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw orange juice concentrate completely.
2. Peel and slice peaches into juice, mixing until all peaches are coated.
3. Shake off excess juice from the peaches.
4. Place the peach slices into freezer bags and freeze.
5. If freezing a large quantity of peaches, add more orange juice concentrate if there is more peach juice than orange juice.
6. Chill leftover juice and enjoy! Peaches will retain their bright orange color and delicious fresh-picked flavor.
